title: Rank-R1: A Reasoning-Enhanced LLM-Based Reranker with Reinforcement Learning

defines.name: Rank-R1
defines.definition: A reinforcement-learning-trained LLM reranker that generates reasoning before selecting the most relevant document from a candidate set.

problem: Existing LLM-based rerankers typically rely on prompting or supervised fine-tuning without explicitly learning reasoning, limiting their effectiveness on complex relevance judgments.
